positive: A majestic griffin perched on a crumbling ancient stone altar, surrounded by glowing runes and mystical fog. Detailed fantasy ink sketch, cross-hatching style, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, epic scale, reminiscent of classic fantasy book covers.
